# What’s the Best Cannabis Seed Bank in America?
by Nebula Haze
FOR INFORMATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY, I AM NOT A LAWYER OR LEGAL EXPERT ON MARIJUANA SEED BANKS IN THE USA
At GrowWeedEasy,com, growers ask us a lot, “What is the best cannabis seed bank?” The truth is **there is no “best” marijuana seed source**. Every good seed source has pros and cons. So I can only answer who I’m using for [my grows](https://www.growweedeasy.com/side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal-experiments-by-nebula-haze). Right now for American cannabis genetics, one of the major sources I order seeds from is [Seed Supreme](https://seedsupreme.com#grower).
Germinated cannabis seeds via the [paper towel method](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-germinate-seeds-via-paper-towel-method). High-quality seeds have high germination rates.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/marijuana-seeds-germinated.jpg)
_Fun fact:_ Did you know seedlings are already fully formed with a root and two round leaves inside the seed? Germination just lets them out and they start growing.
There is no **best** US cannabis seed bank, but [one of the seed sources](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) we use at GrowWeedEasy.com is [Seed Supreme](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/seedsman?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64).
[](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
Why them? I’ve been happy with my experiences with them so far (as of September 2024 when I last updated this article) and we also hear great things about them from the readers of our [cannabis growing newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) and [free growing community](https://forum.growweedeasy.com/). They ship out of **Florida** or **California** , and provide delivery tracking. Within the US, orders typically arrive in **1-2 weeks for most states**.
_Insider tip:_ They don’t list all their payment options on the [front of the website](https://seedsupreme.com/payment-methods#grower). Go to checkout and you often see additional payment options.
A recent last harvest featuring Seed Supreme strains. [Check out the journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/summary-of-cannabis-defoliation-side-by-side-experiment).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/hlg-300-rspec-defoliated-tent-just-before-harvest.jpg)
The bottom row of purple buds are [Platinum Cookies](https://seedsupreme.com/platinum-cookies-feminized.html#grower), my favorite strain from this grow.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/a-big-cannabis-harvest-buds-curing-in-jars-sm.jpg)
Here is their [list of American genetics](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) they developed and stabilized in-house. I’ve found their strains to be above-average when it comes to potency and sparkle. I like that they publish detailed growing information about each strain as well as what bud effects to expect. I’ve never seen that from a seed bank before. Whether you’re a home grower or a commercial grower, that extra information can make a huge difference because it helps you properly plan your grow with plants that play well together.
Their [Blueberry](https://seedsupreme.com/blueberry-feminized.html#grower) strain has top-shelf looks and smell with classic effects reminiscent of 90s buds but stronger. Easy to grow.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/blueberry-marijuana-cola-flowering-week5.jpg)
Their version of [White Widow](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/white-widow-feminized-seeds-whitewidow?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) is something special. MUCH more potent than regular White Widow. The buds tested between 24-26% THC. Don’t plan to do anything else that day 🙂
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/white-widow-marijuana-strain.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/nebula-haze-holding-up-white-widow-auto-cannabis-plant-harvest.jpg)
Their [Platinum Cookies](https://seedsupreme.com/platinum-cookies-feminized.html#grower) tested for us up to 28% THC, and produces buds with that quintessential “American” look and smell. The mental and physical effects are captivating but may be too intense for most beginners. Here’s [my review from when I grew their Platinum Cookies](https://www.growweedeasy.com/review-of-platinum-cookies-strain-by-seed-supreme-highly-recommended).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/defoliated-vs-non-defoliated-platinum-cookies-just-before-harvest.jpg)
Other notable strains
  * [Bruce Banner FAST](https://seedsupreme.com/bruce-banner-fast-version.html#grower) is a good choice for commercial growers with high THC up to 30%, big yields, and a short flowering time.
  * [Afghan Hawaiian x Laos x Jamaican](https://seedsupreme.com/afghan-hawaiian-x-laos-x-jamaican-feminized.html#grower) is a potent Sativa hybrid with great yields and uplifting unique mental effects
  * [Wedding Cake Autoflower](https://seedsupreme.com/wedding-cake-autoflower.html#grower) is an [autoflowering](https://www.growweedeasy.com/why-beginners-should-grow-auto-flowering-strains) strain that produces photoperiod-quality buds in about 70 days from seed to harvest.

Good marijuana seeds will leave you a happy grower.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/germinating-marijuana-seeds-paper-towel-smiley-face.jpg)
Now that _that’s_ out of the way, continue on to the rest of the article…
Sirius and I have been ordering cannabis seeds online since 2010, and we maintain a [list of the seed banks](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) that we use the most. Most seed banks we’ve used and recommended are located in the U.K., Netherlands, or Spain. In fact, until recently, these 3 countries in Europe contained nearly all the big cannabis seed banks in the world. Weed isn’t legal to grow in those countries, but they have specific laws or loopholes that make it easier to run a seed bank.
Now that recreational use and home cultivation has been [legalized](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-legalization-world) for adults in Canada, seed banks are getting established there, too.
Yet isn’t cannabis cultivation [legal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/where-united-states-cannabis-legal-to-grow) in several U.S. states? Where are the American seed banks?
American-bred cannabis strains tend to be “high” on sparkle.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/cmh-pacific-punch-buds-trichomes-nug.jpg)
There is a huge thriving cannabis market in parts of the U.S. and American breeders are developing world-famous cannabis strains. Where can you buy the genetics? What’s the best American seed bank? And why is it so hard to find current information about online seed banks in America?
The problem has to do with the American federal government and the current legal status of cannabis. Marijuana and derivatives (including seeds) are considered a Schedule 1 drug with essentially no accepted legal use. This makes it hard if not impossible for a seed bank to run in the U.S. the way they do in the U.K., the Netherlands, Spain, or Canada (which have legal loopholes or full-on legalization).
Where can you buy cannabis seeds in the United States?
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/closeup-cannabis-seeds-white-background-1.jpg)
American seed sources often come and go. I purchased seeds for the following buds last summer and harvested the plant 4 months later. When I tried to buy more seeds, the breeder and seed company had already disappeared. This isn’t unusual. It’s just something to keep in mind with American sources.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/ocean-fruit-buds-hlg-300-led-grown.jpg)
## What’s the Problem with American Seed Sources?
  * **American Seed Banks Disappear** – I order seeds every few months, yet when I’ve ordered from an American seed source, the company is often gone by the time I’m ready to order my next set of seeds. Although cannabis cultivation has been legalized in some states, the federal government (which considers cannabis and seeds a Schedule 1 drug) has jurisdiction over the mail. That means getting caught sending seeds through the mail comes with harsh legal penalties for the sellers. As a result, American seed companies regularly get spooked and shut down or just disappear without a trace or explanation. Enforcement against selling seeds is less strict in certain countries like the Netherlands, the U.K., and Spain. In fact, in some jurisdictions in those countries, the laws are surprisingly tolerant of seed banks. Similar exceptions and special rules have not been carved out in the United States. It’s due to lack of local regulation that many (if not most) of the longest-running seed banks are located in the Netherlands, the U.K., or Spain. Now that Canada has legalized growing for adults, seed banks are starting to get well-established there, too.
  * **Refuse to Accept Debit or Credit Cards** – American seedbanks often only take Bitcoin, certified checks, money orders, Venmo, Cashapp, or cash. Unfortunately, those payment options leave you without recourse if the seeds don’t show up. It’s easy to get scammed when paying in cash. Why won’t American seed banks accept debit, credit, or bank drafts? One reason is cannabis companies lack access to banking in America (again due to the federal legal status). In fact, many cannabis operations and dispensaries are run almost completely in cash. This makes it difficult for them to take non-cash payments. The bigger the company, the harder it gets to fly under the radar. When an American seed bank offers something convenient like Paypal, credit card, or bank drafts, they’re shut down quickly once they get popular. Although European seed banks do occasionally lose payment options, there is usually an option for credit/debit card or bank drafts.
  * **Strain Quality is More Variable** – While European seed companies have been competing for customers since the 1980s (and earlier), most American seed sources were only established in the last few years. As a result of fly-by-night breeders and little competition, many seeds ordered from American sources produce unreliable results. There are trustworthy American breeders, but they’re often listed right next to unknown and questionable breeders that sell crosses that were randomly slapped together. Yields, potency, and growth rates may be poor, even if you do everything right. There’s little curation of breeders and stabilized strains in American Seed Banks like with the established European seed sources. You have to do your own research to avoid bad breeders.
  * **American Genetics Are Available Overseas** – European breeders have been steadily importing and stabilizing popular American strains. Many strains have been developed by trustworthy breeders with 100% American genetics, especially in the last few years. That means you can get American genetics from a more consistent and trustworthy source that takes non-cash payments.

[Girl Scout Cookies](https://seedsupreme.com/girl-scout-cookies-feminized.html#grower) is a popular American strain
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/purple-girl-scout-cookies-colas.jpg)
Hand-picked American genetics available as stabilized strains from established seed banks.
  * [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower) by Seed Supreme – I’m growing this version of Blue Dream right now, see [grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/sweet-dreams-photoperiod-grow-journal-in-progress)
  * [Cakes & Cream](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/new-cakes-n-cream-f/ref/63951/) by In-House Genetics
  * [Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) by Happy Valley Genetics
  * [Dirty Unicorn](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/dirty-unicorn/ref/63951/) by Dirty Bird Genetics
  * [Dos Si Dos 33](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/do-si-dos-33/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Barneys Farm – A crowd favorite kind of strain
  * [Gorilla Glue #4](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/gorilla-glue-4-s1-feminised-seeds-lv8-gogl4s1-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Elev8 – Some growers consider this the #! best seed version of GG4
  * [Platinum Cookies](https://seedsupreme.com/platinum-cookies-feminized.html#grower) by Seed Supreme – check out my [home grow review](https://www.growweedeasy.com/review-of-platinum-cookies-strain-by-seed-supreme-highly-recommended)
  * [Pound Cake](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/humboldt-pound-cake-feminised-seeds-humb-hpc-f?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Humboldt Seed Co
  * [Prism Marker](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/prism-marker-feminized-seeds-lv8-prma-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Elev8 – for growers who want that “magazine” look to your buds
  * [Purple Ghost Candy](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-ghost-candy-feminized-seeds-sman-pgcandy-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Seedsman – check out my [home grow review](https://www.growweedeasy.com/home-grow-strain-review-purple-ghost-candy-by-seedsman)
  * [Purple Punch](https://seedsupreme.com/purple-punch-feminized.html#grower) by Seed Supreme
  * [Sour Lime Haze](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/sour-lime-haze/ref/63951/) by Dirty Bird Genetics
  * [White Wedding RBX](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/white-wedding-rbx-feminised-seeds-etho-whwerbx-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Ethos – won many a cannabis cup
  * [Wifi OG](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/new-wifi-og-f/ref/63951/) by Blimburn

The breeders are based in the United States with excellent genetics (_Some of their strains are in high demand and some may be sold out, but they are restocked regularly so keep checking back)._ You can choose any of their strains and know it’s going to be good.
  * [Dirty Bird Genetics](https://northatlanticseed.com/product-category/seeds/dirty-bird-genetics/ref/63951/) (Maine, USA)
  * [Elev8 Seeds](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/elev8-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64&sortKey=bestsellers) (Seattle, Washington)
  * [Ethos Genetics](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/breeders/ethos-genetics?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) (Denver, Colorado)
  * [Happy Valley Genetics](https://seedsupreme.com/seed-banks/happy-valley-genetics.html#grower) (Massachusetts)
  * [Humboldt Seed Company](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/humboldt-seed-co?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) (Humboldt, California)
  * [Seed Supreme](https://seedsupreme.com/seed-banks/seed-supreme.html#grower) (Florida, USA)

## European Seed Banks
European seed banks have some benefits over American seed banks:
  * **Cheaper** – American genetics can get expensive. Strains from American breeders often cost a lot more than European strains of similar quality, even if they’re using the same genetics.
  * **Established European seed banks rarely disappear** – Seed companies are well established in Europe, and are often located in countries that look the other way. That means European seed banks almost never close down, while seed banks in America regularly vanish. You never know if they got in trouble or just stopped selling seeds. If you happened to make an order right before a seed bank closes down, you may never get your seeds even if they were a legitimate company.
  * **Consistency** – European breeders have been around a while and are specialists at consistency. When you buy seeds that claim the plant will stay short, smell a certain way, have a specific potency, etc, you almost always get what the breeder said. Yields and growth rates tend to be better overall. In America, you often order a pack of seeds and every single plant comes out totally different with variable quality.

**My favorite European Seedbanks are:**
  * [Seedsman](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Huge selection of seeds from all over the world, great prices, fast shipping.
  * [MSNL Seeds](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/?aw_affiliate=eyJjYW1wYWlnbl9pZCI6IjYiLCJ0cmFmZmljX3NvdXJjZSI6InNlZWRzcGFnZSIsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOjE2MX0) – Carries only their own strains, but this seed bank is run by a geneticist and their strains are excellent.

This homegrown [Tangerine Dream Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/tangerine-dream-auto-feminised-seeds-bfstd-auto-f?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) was described by the grower as “citrus fruit fantasy”
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/04/tangerine-dream-cannabis-bud.jpg)
Ok, I got it. But what are the advantages of ordering from an American seed bank?
## American Seed Banks Have Advantages for U.S. residents:
  * **Much faster shipping** – One of the main things American seed banks can offer to American growers is seeds show up fast. Since seeds don’t have to get imported or exported, they often appear in just a few days. When I order from Europe, seeds can take anywhere from 2-6 weeks to arrive. When I order from US-based [Seed Supreme](https://seedsupreme.com#grower), seeds usually arrive in under 2 weeks.
  * **Delivery tracking** – Although many European banks offer delivery tracking, it isn’t very accurate or helpful for Americans since the package is originating in another country. An American seed bank will give you tracking with USPS, UPS, Fedex, etc that lets you more accurately see where seeds are and know which day to expect them.
  * **Sparkly, Smelly Genetics** – Although European breeders are regularly incorporating popular American genetics in their new strains, the truth is that American breeders tend to select for different things. For example, in general, American breeders seem to focus on sparkle, overall bud appearance, and strong unique smells.
  * **Potency** – American strains regularly produce buds with over 25% and some strains produce over 30% THC. _Note:_ This isn’t always a good thing. At those levels, bud effects are often too intense for typical users (i.e. [Platinum Cookies](https://seedsupreme.com/platinum-cookies-feminized.html#grower)).

American laws are changing all the time, and it’s possible that banking will be legalized for state-legal cannabis companies, or the feds may reduce their restrictions on sending seeds through the mail. If that happens, we’ll see tons more American seed banks appear overnight.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/zweet-inzanity-lec-cmh-grown-buds.jpg)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
